Pokemon.Context/Notes: Level approximate — not specified in source notes.

Note: Moves marked with "Default Moveset": true were not custom-defined by the trainer in the game's source data and were computed from the species' level-up learnset (extracted directly from the game's ROM) instead. Trainer order approximates story progression based on the source file's authoring order plus location-name matching for newly-added battles; it is not verified against full map-traversal data. Moves confirmed directly by the player (not from ROM extraction) are marked without "Default Moveset", and slots left null (empty) mean that move is genuinely unconfirmed — click a move in the app to fill it in.
